steps.title: Identify the verb subject
steps.content: In the clause "the toxins the organism uses to protect itself from predation actually ___ its attractiveness," the subject of the blank verb is "the toxins." That subject is plural, so the verb must use a plural present-tense form.

steps.title: Match plural agreement
steps.content:
• Choice A: "Is increasing" is singular, so it disagrees with "toxins."
  • Choice C: "Increases" is the singular present-tense form.
  • Choice D: "Has increased" is singular present perfect, so it also disagrees with the plural subject.
The answer is B.
